name: Can I get benefits if warehouse accident worsened my old shoulder issue?

mainEntity.name: Can I get benefits if warehouse accident worsened my old shoulder issue?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, apportionment covers new worsening; prior stable conditions qualify.** Expert testimony key.[3] Key factors: baseline records; impairment change. Avoid if degenerative only; comp pays increase. Common success.[3]
